title: Pass meme-ineligible requirement to fix agent

log.context: Pass meme-ineligible requirement to fix agent

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**`activities/congress_act.py`** — Added a `show_trial` mode to `congress_identities`:
- `show_trial` allows statuses: `eligible`, `ineligible`, `meme` (moderator explicitly excluded)
- `standard` and `meme` modes are unchanged

**`workflows/trial_wf.py`** — Two changes:
1. `TrialWorkflow` now always calls `congress_identities("show_trial")` instead of passing the user-facing `mode` string
2. The pool-building loop now excludes only `moderator`-status...(truncated)
